cxu_object.claim: The bounce trade setup requires four steps executed in sequence: first establish an overall market read from macro sentiment and signal consensus to determine bullish or bearish bias, then wait for a spike move in the opposite direction of that read, then enter against the spike with position size and stop loss determined by market regime and a fixed percentage risk budget, then manage the exit with an adaptive trailing stop that tightens as profit grows

supporting_contexts.text: Step A — Market Read: Combine macro sentiment (crypto breadth, fear and greed, cross-asset correlation, TradFi indicators) with signal consensus from the direct feed and AGDEL purchased signals. Establish a directional bias: BULLISH, BEARISH, or NEUTRAL. Only look for bounce setups when the read is not NEUTRAL — a strong directional bias means counter-moves are likely to revert.

Step B — Wait for Counter-Spike: Monitor for a sharp price move AGAINST the established bias. For a bullish read, wait for a spike DOWN (3+ red candles with total drop exceeding the bounce-entry-strategy dropThresholdPct). For a bearish read, wait for a spike UP. The counter-spike creates the entry opportunity — do not chase moves in the direction of the bias.

Step C — Entry and Initial Stop: Enter against the spike direction (buy the dip if bullish, sell the rip if bearish). Position size and leverage are determined by market regime: ranging = higher conviction (40-65% equity, 5x), trending = moderate (25-40%, 3x), volatile = conservative (15-20%, 2x). Set initial stop loss at a fixed percentage of position value as the risk budget — for example 5% of position value. This is the maximum acceptable loss on the trade.

Step D — Trailing Stop Management: Once positioned, manage exit with the adaptive trailing stop from stop_manager.py. Trail starts at 1.5% when profit is under $100, tightens to 1.0% at $100-300, to 0.75% at $300-500, and to 0.5% above $500. The stop only moves in the protective direction, never back. This captures the bulk of momentum runs while giving enough room for noise in the early stages.

riskBudgetPct.description: Maximum loss as % of position value for initial stop loss

rangingSizePct.description: Position size (% of equity) in ranging regime

trendingSizePct.description: Position size (% of equity) in trending regime

volatileSizePct.description: Position size (% of equity) in volatile regime

version.change_description: Complete bounce setup strategy: market read → counter-spike → regime-sized entry → adaptive trailing stop
